title: ottelia javanica
intro: Ottelia javanica, also known as water wisteria or Indian water wisteria, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocharitaceae. It is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ottelia javanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Ottelia javanica can be made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, or applied topically as a paste or ointment.
